name: Biology
description: Comprehensive biology curriculum covering from molecular level to global ecosystems.

topics.name: 1. Bevezetés a biológiába
topics.description: Introduction to Biology - Foundational concepts of biology

modules.name: 1.1. A biológia tudománya
modules.description: Characteristics of living organisms and research methods

modules.name: 1.2. Fizikai, kémiai alapismeretek
modules.description: Basic physical and chemical fundamentals

modules.name: 2.1. Szervezetek és szerves alkotóelemek
modules.description: Elements, molecules, lipids, carbohydrates, proteins, nucleic acids, and laboratory activities

modules.name: 2.2. Az anyagsere folyamatai
modules.description: Cellular metabolism, nutrition and metabolic pathways

modules.name: 2.3. Sejtalkatotók az eukarióta sejtben
modules.description: Eukaryotic cell structure and organelles

topics.name: 3. Az egyed szerveződési szintje
topics.description: Organism level organization - cellular to multicellular

modules.name: 3.1. Nem sejtes rendszerek
modules.description: Non-cellular organisms - Viruses and Prions

modules.name: 3.2. Sejtes rendszerek
modules.description: Prokaryotes and Eukaryotes

modules.name: 3.3. Többsejtű eukarióták
modules.description: Multicellular eukaryotes and their characteristics

modules.name: 3.4. Szövetek, szervezetek, szerrendszerek, testájak
modules.description: Tissue and organism systems organization

topics.name: 4. Az emberi szervezet
topics.description: Comprehensive study of human body systems and functions

modules.name: 4.1. Homeostázis
modules.description: Homeostasis and systemic perspective in human body

modules.name: 4.2. Kültakaró
modules.description: Skin structure and function, skin care and defense

modules.name: 4.3. A mozgás
modules.description: Skeletal anatomy, muscle types, muscular system health

modules.name: 4.4. A táplálkozás
modules.description: Nutrition, digestion, metabolism and nutritional health

modules.name: 4.5. A légzés
modules.description: Respiratory system, gas exchange and breathing health

modules.name: 4.6. Az anyagszállítás
modules.description: Circulatory system, blood composition and cardiovascular health

modules.name: 4.7. A kiválasztás
modules.description: Urinary system, kidney function and waste elimination

modules.name: 4.8. A szabályozás
modules.description: Nervous and endocrine systems, hormonal regulation and immune function

modules.name: 4.9. Szaporodás és egyedfejlődés
modules.description: Reproduction, sexual development and offspring development

modules.name: 5.1. Populáció
modules.description: Population characteristics, environmental relationships and population dynamics

modules.name: 5.2. Életközösségek
modules.description: Ecological communities and species interactions

modules.name: 5.4. Ökoszisztéma
modules.description: Ecosystem structure, energy flow and biological relationships

modules.name: 5.3. Bioszféra 5.5. Környezet- és természetvédelem 5.6. Fenntarthatóság
modules.description: Global processes, environmental protection and sustainable development

modules.name: 6.1. Molekuláris genetika
modules.description: DNA structure, replication, transcription and translation processes

modules.name: 6.2. Mendeli genetika
modules.description: Mendelian inheritance patterns, genetic variation and population genetics

modules.name: 6.3. Evolúció
modules.description: Evolution mechanisms, Darwin's theory, Hardy-Weinberg model and evolutionary change

modules.name: 6.4. A bioszféra evolúciója
modules.description: Evolution mechanisms, Darwin's theory, Hardy-Weinberg model and evolutionary change

name: World History
description: Currently studying: The Renaissance. Focus on early 15th-century Florentine art.

topics.name: The Renaissance
topics.description: Explore the cultural, artistic, political, and economic 'rebirth' following the Middle Ages.
